title: Guardrail
content:
# Guardrail


## Properties

- **resource** (`string`): The Asset/Data Stream pair to which the Guardrail is applied. (example: `krn:ad:asset1/setpoint`).
- **control_disabled** (`boolean`): Current status indicating whether this Guardrail is active or disabled.
- **number** (`object`): 
- **updater** (`object`): 
- **created_at** (`string`): UTC time when the object was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that created the object.
- **updated_at** (`string`): UTC time when any keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that last updated any of the keys.
summary: Object with properties: resource, control_disabled, number, updater, created_at

resource.description: The Asset/Data Stream pair to which the Guardrail is applied. (example: `krn:ad:asset1/setpoint`).

control_disabled.description: Current status indicating whether this Guardrail is active or disabled.

relative.description: Allowable rate of increase/decrease of the Asset / Data Stream pair.

increase.description: Allowable rate of increase of the Asset / Data Stream pair.

value.description: The limiting rate of change value.

inclusive.description: The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.

value.description: The limiting rate of change value.

inclusive.description: The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.

decrease.description: Allowable rate of decrease of the Asset / Data Stream pair.

value.description: The limiting rate of change value.

inclusive.description: The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.

value.description: The limiting rate of change value.

inclusive.description: The defined limiting rate of change value is inclusive within the allowable range.

number.description: Limits for absolute minimum and maximum values.

source.description: Asset / Data Stream pair used to determine the values for the minimum and maximum guardrail values.

inclusive.description: The Asset / Data Stream pair value is inclusive within the allowable range.

source.description: Asset / Data Stream pair used to determine the values for the minimum and maximum guardrail values.

inclusive.description: The Asset / Data Stream pair value is inclusive within the allowable range.

created_at.description: UTC time when the object was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: KRN of the user or process that created the object.

updated_at.description: UTC time when any keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: KRN of the user or process that last updated any of the keys.
